rewritten_requirements: The system shall display a list of available orders to the delivery person.
The system shall allow the delivery person to contact the delivery address for coordination.
The system shall enable the delivery person to update their profile as needed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system shall display a list of available orders for the delivery person.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A delivery person starts by viewing the available orders.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system shall allow the delivery person to contact the delivery address to coordinate the delivery.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, they contact the delivery address to coordinate the delivery.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system shall enable the delivery person to update their profile if necessary.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Finally, they update their profile if needed
